modules.name: Animal Hospital Codes
modules.description: Animal Hospital currently has no code redemption system. Check back for updates — we monitor all channels for new code releases.

highlights.label: RELEASE
highlights.detail: 500 Coins + 1,000 Cash (launch celebration code)

highlights.label: UPDATE2
highlights.detail: 750 Coins and a 15-minute 2x XP boost

highlights.label: 1KLIKES
highlights.detail: 1,000 Cash + free Pistol Mk2 starter weapon

highlights.label: 5KLIKES
highlights.detail: 2,500 Coins + 2x Coins boost (10 minutes)

highlights.label: WAVE10
highlights.detail: 1,500 Coins for reaching the wave-10 milestone

highlights.label: SUBTODEV
highlights.detail: 800 Cash + exclusive Medic Class unlock

highlights.label: ZOMBIESLAYER

highlights.label: SUMMER

modules.name: Animal Hospital Tier List
modules.description: All 10 classes ranked from S to D tier. Compare costs, abilities, and upgrade paths to find your perfect class.

highlights.label: S
highlights.detail: Minigun, Rocket Launcher, Flamethrower — top-tier DPS and AoE clear that shred horde waves and melt bosses; highest priority investments.

highlights.label: A
highlights.detail: LMG, Combat Shotgun, Sniper Rifle — reliable burst and sustained damage; the backbone of any solid mid-to-late loadout.

highlights.label: B
highlights.detail: Assault Rifle, SMG, Dual Pistols — balanced all-rounders that carry early-to-mid waves with good ammo economy.

highlights.label: C
highlights.detail: Pump Shotgun, Revolver, Crossbow — situational picks; strong in narrow corridors but fall off against fast hordes.

highlights.label: D
highlights.detail: Baseball Bat, Starter Pistol, Knife — last-resort and early-game fillers; replace as soon as Coins allow.

modules.name: Animal Hospital Best Weapons and Classes
modules.description: A roster overview of the strongest weapons and classes in Animal Hospital. Compare the top picks for horde clear, boss damage, and support so you can build the right loadout for each wave bracket and playstyle.

highlights.label: Minigun
highlights.detail: Highest sustained DPS in the game — mows down entire waves but burns Cash fast; pair with the Heavy class for max ammo.

highlights.label: Rocket Launcher
highlights.detail: Best AoE burst for clustered hordes and boss phases; limited ammo means use it on dense groups or elite anomalys.

highlights.label: Sniper Rifle
highlights.detail: One-shot headshot potential on most anomalys; ideal for picking off Brutes and Spitters from range before they close in.

highlights.label: Combat Shotgun
highlights.detail: Excellent close-range stopping power; perfect for holding doorways and choke points during swarm waves.

highlights.label: Heavy Class
highlights.detail: Bonus ammo capacity and reload speed; turns LMG and Minigun into unstoppable horde-clearing machines.

highlights.label: Medic Class
highlights.detail: Heals nearby teammates and regenerates health; essential for co-op survival on high waves.

highlights.label: Scout Class
highlights.detail: Increased movement speed and reload speed; best for kiting fast anomalys and repositioning during boss fights.

highlights.label: Engineer Class
highlights.detail: Deploys barricades and turrets; strong for fortifying a defensive position and buying time on endless waves.

modules.name: Animal Hospital Beginner Guide
modules.description: Step-by-step walkthrough for new Animal Hospital players. Learn how to redeem codes, buy your first weapon, manage Coins and Cash, pick the right class, and survive your first boss wave without wasting resources.

highlights.detail: Launch Animal Hospital from the official Roblox page and join a match in the arena lobby.
Redeem every active code from the Codes menu to stock up on free Coins, Cash, and a starter weapon before wave 1.
Pick a class that fits your role — Scout for solo kiting, Medic for team support, or Heavy for raw firepower.
Spend your starting Cash on an Assault Rifle or SMG; never face the first wave with only the starter pistol.
Earn Coins from each kill and surviving each wave, then upgrade to a Combat Shotgun or Sniper Rifle as you progress.
Stay near a choke point or wall to avoid being surrounded, and save Coins for a boss wave every 5 waves.

modules.name: Animal Hospital Wave Guide
modules.description: Complete wave-by-wave progression guide for Animal Hospital. Covers enemy types that appear in each wave bracket, when special anomalys spawn, boss wave timing, and the recommended weapons and positioning for each phase.

highlights.label: Waves 1–4
highlights.detail: Basic Walkers only — slow and weak. Use the starter SMG or Assault Rifle to conserve Coins for later upgrades.

highlights.label: Waves 5–9
highlights.detail: Runners and Shamblers appear; faster enemies require tighter aim and a Combat Shotgun for close-range bursts.

highlights.label: Wave 5 Boss
highlights.detail: First boss spawns — a Brute with heavy armor. Switch to high single-target damage like the Sniper Rifle.

highlights.label: Waves 10–14
highlights.detail: Exploders and Spitters join the horde; keep distance from Exploders and prioritize Spitters that damage from range.

highlights.label: Wave 10 Boss
highlights.detail: Mini-boss wave with a Tank plus a runner escort — clear the escort first, then focus fire the Tank.

highlights.label: Waves 15–19
highlights.detail: Armored anomalys and mixed elite spawns; switch to AoE weapons like the LMG or Flamethrower to handle density.

highlights.label: Wave 20+
highlights.detail: Endless-mode scaling begins — enemy health and speed ramp up. Invest in the Minigun and coordinate with your team.

highlights.label: Every 5th Wave
highlights.detail: Boss waves always hit on multiples of 5; stockpile Coins and ammo before each one to survive the spike.

modules.name: Animal Hospital Boss Guide
modules.description: Strategy guide for every boss in Animal Hospital. Learn boss attack patterns, weak points, the best weapons to counter each one, and class-based tactics for surviving boss waves solo or in co-op.

highlights.label: The Brute
highlights.detail: Wave 5 boss — heavily armored and slow. Kite it while landing Sniper headshots; never let it corner you.

highlights.label: The Tank
highlights.detail: Wave 10 boss — huge health pool and a ground-slam AoE. Keep your distance and chip it down with the LMG.

highlights.label: The Spitter Queen
highlights.detail: Wave 15 boss — ranged acid attacks plus a runner escort. Kill the escort first, then close in with a Combat Shotgun.

highlights.label: The Exploder King
highlights.detail: Wave 20 boss — charges and detonates on contact. Bait its charge, dodge sideways, and punish with the Rocket Launcher.

highlights.label: The Hive Mind
highlights.detail: Endless-mode mega-boss — spawns minions constantly. Use the Flamethrower to clear adds while DPS focus the boss.

highlights.label: Boss Weak Points
highlights.detail: Most bosses have a head weak spot taking bonus damage; aim down sights with a Sniper for maximum burst.

highlights.label: Class Roles vs Bosses
highlights.detail: Heavy handles sustained DPS, Medic keeps the team alive, Scout kites and revives, Engineer drops turrets for extra fire.

highlights.label: Survival Tip
highlights.detail: Always pre-buy ammo and a reload-boost item before a boss wave — running dry mid-fight is the #1 cause of boss-wave wipes.

modules.name: Animal Hospital Tips and Tricks
modules.description: Proven strategies to survive longer and rank higher in Animal Hospital. Covers economy management, positioning, ammo discipline, team coordination, and loadout timing for every phase of the match.

highlights.detail: Redeem every active code before your first match to start with a real weapon instead of the starter pistol.
Always hold a choke point or doorway — funneling anomalys into a line makes any weapon far more efficient.
Never spend all your Coins at once; save at least 50% for an emergency upgrade before boss waves.
Prioritize Exploders and Spitters over Walkers — they deal the most damage if left alive.
Use XP and Coin boost codes right before a long session to maximize the multiplier on every kill.
In co-op, assign roles early — one Medic, one Heavy DPS, and one Scout to kite and revive keeps the team balanced.

modules.name: Animal Hospital Update Log
modules.description: Track the latest Animal Hospital patches, new weapons, class reworks, balance changes, and seasonal events. Stay ahead of the meta and never miss a new code drop or limited-time reward.

highlights.label: Launch Update
highlights.detail: Animal Hospital officially released on Roblox with 20+ waves, 8 weapons, and 4 playable classes.

highlights.label: Update 2 — New Weapons
highlights.detail: Added the Minigun and Rocket Launcher, plus a Wave-10 Tank boss encounter.

highlights.label: Balance Pass
highlights.detail: Sniper Rifle headshot damage increased; Combat Shotgun pellet spread tightened for better consistency.

highlights.label: New Class: Engineer
highlights.detail: Introduced the Engineer class with deployable barricades and turrets for defensive playstyles.

highlights.label: Endless Mode
highlights.detail: Wave 20+ now scales infinitely with a dedicated leaderboard for top survivors.

highlights.label: Summer Event
highlights.detail: Limited-time seasonal event with exclusive codes, a special Hive Mind mega-boss, and cosmetic rewards.

highlights.label: Co-op Improvements
highlights.detail: Expanded to support larger squads, added a revive system, and reworked Medic healing radius.

highlights.label: Next Roadmap
highlights.detail: Devs tease new maps, additional boss variants, and a weapon-skin system in upcoming patches.

explore.description: Jump straight to the eight homepage sections and scroll to the module you need.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers to the most common questions about Animal Hospital.

items.question: What is Animal Hospital?
items.answer: Animal Hospital is an anime-themed lane-battler tower defense on Roblox, developed by TBD. Players summon collectible anime heroes, deploy them along the lane to defend against waves of enemies, and progress through Story, Squadron and Challenge modes. It fully launched on June 13, 2026.

items.question: Which units should beginners summon first?
items.answer: Prioritize one DPS carry and one Farm unit from your first 10-pull. DPS units clear waves and bosses, while Farm units keep your Yen economy flowing so you can afford upgrades on later waves. Avoid sinking resources into low-rarity tanks until you have a solid carry online.

items.question: Where do I find active codes?
items.answer: Use the Codes page for the full list of working codes, rewards, expiration notes, and a step-by-step redemption walkthrough. The Codes button unlocks at Level 10 — new codes drop around CCU and likes milestones, so check back weekly.

items.question: What are Secret Units?
items.answer: Secret Units are ultra-rare (≈0.1% pull rate) anime heroes that sit at the top of every tier list. They drop from the dedicated Secret stage rotation and from the summon banner. They define the meta — if you pull one, invest Trait Rerolls and Perfect Cubes into it immediately.

items.question: Is Animal Hospital free to play?
items.answer: Yes — Animal Hospital is free to play on Roblox across mobile, PC, console and VR. Optional cosmetics, gamepasses and boosts are available through Robux, but you can also get free Gems, Trait Rerolls and Stat Cubes by redeeming active codes.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.metaDescription: Contact Animal Hospital Wiki — reach out for questions, feedback, corrections, or business inquiries.

sections.heading: Get in Touch
paragraphs: We welcome questions, feedback, corrections, and business inquiries. Whether you spotted an outdated code, found a typo in a unit guide, or want to suggest new content for Animal Hospital Wiki, we'd love to hear from you.

sections.heading: Email Us
paragraphs: For all inquiries, please email us at: {email}
We typically respond within 48 hours. When reporting an issue with a code or guide, please include the specific page URL and a brief description of the problem.

sections.heading: What We Can Help With
paragraphs: Expired or non-working codes that need updating
Incorrect unit stats, tier list rankings, or evolution paths
Suggestions for new guides, traits, or gamepass reviews
Bug reports or broken links on the site
Business or partnership inquiries

sections.heading: Connect with the Community
paragraphs: For game-specific discussions, we recommend joining the official Animal Hospital Discord or visiting the Roblox game page. Our wiki complements these community resources with curated guides and regularly updated content.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for Animal Hospital Wiki — how we collect, use, and protect your data, including cookies, Google AdSense, and third-party advertising.

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: Animal Hospital Wiki ("we", "us", or "our") operates the website https://animesquadron.games (the "Site"). This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have.

By using this Site, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy. This Site is an independent fan-made wiki and is not affiliated with Roblox Corporation, TBD, or any anime franchise referenced in the game.

sections.heading: 2. Information We Collect
paragraphs: We collect minimal information necessary to provide and improve our content:

Automatically collected data: When you visit our Site, our hosting provider and analytics tools may automatically record your IP address (or a truncated version), browser type, device type, approximate geographic region (country-level), pages visited, referring URL, and time spent on pages.
Information you provide: We do not require registration or account creation. If you contact us via email, we will receive the email address and content of your message.

sections.heading: 3. Cookies and Similar Technologies
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on your device. We and our third-party partners use cookies and similar technologies (such as web beacons and local storage) for the following purposes:
Essential cookies: Necessary for the basic functioning of the website (e.g., remembering your language preference).
Analytics cookies: Help us understand how visitors use the Site so we can improve content and performance.
Advertising cookies: Used by Google AdSense and other advertising networks to display relevant ads and measure ad performance. See Section 4 for details.
You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings. However, disabling cookies may affect some features of the Site.

sections.heading: 4. Google AdSense and Third-Party Advertising
paragraphs: We display advertisements through Google AdSense and other advertising networks (such as AdSterra) to support the ongoing maintenance and development of this Site.

Google AdSense: Third-party vendors, including Google, use cookies to serve ads based on a user's prior visits to this and other websites. Google's use of advertising cookies enables it and its partners to serve ads to our users based on their visit to our Site and/or other sites on the Internet.

Users may opt out of Google's use of personalized advertising by visiting Google Ads Settings (https://www.google.com/settings/ads). Users may also opt out of third-party vendors' use of cookies for personalized advertising by visiting www.aboutads.info/choices.

Other advertising networks: We may partner with additional ad networks. These partners may also use cookies and similar technologies to serve and measure ads. Each partner has its own privacy policy governing data collection and use.

sections.heading: 5. Third-Party Services
paragraphs: We use the following third-party services that may process your data:
Google AdSense and Google Analytics: For advertising and website analytics. See Google's Privacy Policy (https://policies.google.com/privacy).
Cloudflare: For content delivery network (CDN) and security services. See Cloudflare's Privacy Policy (https://www.cloudflare.com/privacypolicy/).
Roblox: External links may lead to Roblox.com, which is governed by Roblox's own Privacy Policy.
Discord and YouTube: External links to our community Discord and YouTube channel are governed by their respective privacy policies.
We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third-party services. We encourage you to review their privacy policies.

sections.heading: 6. Data Retention
paragraphs: We retain automatically collected analytics data for up to 24 months. Email correspondence from contact inquiries is retained for as long as necessary to respond to and resolve your inquiry, typically up to 12 months.
Advertising networks may retain data according to their own retention policies. Please consult their respective privacy policies for details.

sections.heading: 7. Your Rights and Choices
paragraphs: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:
Access and portability: You can request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
Correction and deletion: You can request that we correct inaccurate data or delete your personal data.

Opt-out of personalized advertising: To opt out of personalized advertising from Google and other providers, you can: visit https://www.google.com/settings/ads to manage Google ad settings; use the "Do Not Track" feature in your browser; or contact us using the information on our Contact page.
To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at the email provided on our Contact page.

sections.heading: 8. Children's Privacy (COPPA)
paragraphs: This Site is directed at a general audience and does not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. Animal Hospital is a game on the Roblox platform which has its own safety measures for younger users.
If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us so we can take appropriate action to delete such information.

sections.heading: 9. GDPR (European Economic Area and UK)
paragraphs: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA) or the United Kingdom, you have certain rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the UK GDPR, including the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, and port your personal data.
Our lawful basis for processing your data is legitimate interest (providing and improving the website) and consent (for non-essential cookies and personalized advertising).
To exercise your GDPR rights, please contact us through our Contact page. We will respond within one month of receiving your request.

sections.heading: 10. CCPA (California Residents)
paragraphs: Under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), California residents have the right to know what personal information is collected, request deletion, and opt out of the sale of personal information. We do not sell personal information.
To exercise your rights under CCPA, contact us through our Contact page.

sections.heading: 11. Changes to This Privacy Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.

sections.heading: 12. Contact Us
paragraphs: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through our Contact page or email us directly.

about.title: About Animal Hospital Wiki
about.metaDescription: About Animal Hospital Wiki — an independent fan community site for Roblox Animal Hospital with codes, tier lists, unit guides, and more.

sections.heading: What Is Animal Hospital Wiki?
paragraphs: Animal Hospital Wiki is an independent fan-made community site dedicated to the Roblox anime tower defense game Animal Hospital by TBD. Our mission is to provide accurate, up-to-date information to help players of all skill levels get the most out of the game.

We cover the latest codes, comprehensive unit tier lists, evolution paths, trait explanations, gamepass reviews, and update breakdowns. Whether you're a new player figuring out your first summon or a veteran optimizing your anomaly survival strategy, our guides are designed to help you succeed.

sections.heading: Our Content
paragraphs: All content on this site is independently created and maintained by fans. We do not claim any affiliation with Roblox Corporation, TBD, or any anime franchise referenced in the game.

Game information such as unit stats, codes, and update details can change frequently. We strive to keep our content current, but always verify critical information in-game or through official channels.

sections.heading: Community
paragraphs: We believe in the power of community. Our wiki complements the official Animal Hospital Discord and Roblox game page by providing structured, searchable guides. We welcome feedback, corrections, and suggestions from fellow players.
If you spot an error or have an idea for new content, please reach out through our Contact page.

terms.title: Terms of Service

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
paragraphs: By accessing and using Animal Hospital Wiki (https://animesquadron.games), you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our Site.

sections.heading: 2. Use of the Site
paragraphs: This Site provides informational game guides, codes, tier lists, and community resources for Animal Hospital, a Roblox game by TBD. Content is provided for informational and entertainment purposes only.
You agree not to misuse the Site, attempt unauthorized access, scrape content at excessive rates, or present this fan wiki as an official Roblox, TBD, or anime franchise property.

sections.heading: 3. Intellectual Property

Game names, unit names, images, and other trademarks belong to their respective owners, including Roblox Corporation and TBD.
This Site is a fan-made resource and does not claim any ownership over the game or its assets.

sections.heading: 4. Third-Party Links
paragraphs: Our Site contains links to external websites, including Roblox.com, Discord, YouTube, and advertising networks. We are not responsible for the content, privacy policies, or practices of these third-party sites.

sections.heading: 5. Disclaimer of Warranties
paragraphs: Game systems, codes, unit stats, and update details may change without notice. Content on this Site is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Always verify important information in-game or through official channels.

sections.heading: 6. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: Animal Hospital Wiki shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, this Site.

sections.heading: 7. Changes to These Terms
paragraphs: We may update these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Continued use of the Site after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

sections.heading: 8. Contact Us
paragraphs: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through our Contact page.
